issues.title: Ending Violence (VAW)
issues.definition: Any harmful act perpetrated against a person’s will based on gender differences.
points: RA 9262: Protection for women and their children from abuse.
Safe Spaces Act: Penalizing catcalling and online harassment.
Consent is key: Every woman has the right to say 'No'.

issues.title: Economic Empowerment
issues.definition: Ensuring women have equal access to wealth, jobs, and financial security.
points: Equal Pay: Right to fair wages for the same work.
Safe Workplaces: Protection from labor exploitation.
Financial Literacy: Tools to manage and grow personal savings.

issues.title: Education Access
issues.definition: The right of every girl to finish schooling and reach her full potential.
points: Scholarship Support: Helping girls overcome financial barriers.
STEM Advocacy: Encouraging girls in science and technology.
Mentorship: Connecting students with career role models.

issues.title: Health & Rights
issues.definition: Access to quality healthcare and the right to make choices about one's body.
points: Reproductive Care: Safe maternal and family planning services.
Mental Health: Support systems for emotional well-being.
Nutrition: Ensuring healthy diets for women in all stages.

stories.name: Lina
stories.story: For years, I thought the shouting was normal. Then I learned about RA 9262. Through the help of my local VAW Desk, I realized I didn’t have to live in fear. Nahanap ko ang aking lakas.

stories.name: Maria
stories.story: When I was catcalled on my way to campus, I used to just look down. But after learning about the Safe Spaces Act, I reported it. It made the street safer for everyone.

stories.name: Anonymous
stories.story: Leaving a toxic relationship was the hardest thing I've done, but the support group here gave me the courage. Now, I advocate for others.

guides.title: Public Harassment
steps: Move to a well-lit area immediately
Call out the behavior if safe to do so
Report to the nearest BPSO or police

guides.title: Domestic Safety
steps: Establish a code word with friends

guides.title: Digital Safety Tips
steps: Use a VPN on public Wi-Fi
